stories.title: Noise infusion banned from statistical products published by Census Bureau
stories.summary: 美国普查局因准确性顾虑暂停在统计产品中使用“噪声注入”隐私保护技术。

stories.title: GLM 5.2 Is Out
stories.summary: OpenGL数学库GLM发布5.2版本，带来性能提升与更多编译器支持。

stories.title: Every Frame Perfect
stories.summary: 深度技术文章探讨现代软件渲染管线中实现“每帧完美”的技术挑战与优化方案。

stories.title: Pyodide 314.0: Python packages can now publish WebAssembly wheels to PyPI
stories.summary: Pyodide 314.0版本更新，支持Python包直接发布WebAssembly轮子文件至PyPI。

stories.title: Treating pancreatic tumours may have revealed cancer's master switch
stories.summary: 科学家在胰腺肿瘤治疗研究中，发现了一个可能控制癌症扩散的潜在“主开关”。

stories.title: 10th Gen Honda Civic Updates Are Signed with AOSP Test Keys
stories.summary: 研究人员发现第10代本田思域的信息娱乐系统更新签名竟使用了AOSP测试密钥。

stories.title: FreeOberon – Open-Source, Cross-Platform, Free Pascal/Turbo Pascal-Like Language
stories.summary: FreeOberon是一个开源、跨平台，且类似Free Pascal的现代编程语言项目。

stories.title: ReactOS (FOSS "Windows") achieves 3D-accelerated Half-Life on real hardware
stories.summary: 开源Windows替代系统ReactOS成功在真实硬件上运行具有3D加速的《半条命》。

stories.title: 'Tell Him He's a Piece of Shit': Meta's New AI Unit Is a Total Mess
stories.summary: Wired报道称Meta新的AI部门内部因管理混乱和策略摇摆陷入困局。

stories.title: Running DOS on Behringers DDX3216 with a DIY x86-Bios from Scratch
stories.summary: 硬核极客通过自制x86 BIOS，成功在百灵达DDX3216数字调音台上运行DOS。

max_score.title: Noise infusion banned from statistical products published by Census Bureau

most_discussed.title: Noise infusion banned from statistical products published by Census Bureau

morning.summary: 本期Hacker News焦点涵盖了技术深度与前沿科研，既有对人口普查数据隐私保护机制的深度探讨，也有高性能计算与编程语言更新。同时，极客社区展现出对老旧硬件创新利用及AI行业内部动荡的浓厚兴趣。
